BivLaplaceRL 1.0.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Introduction to BivLaplaceRL
  • Changelog

Package index

Parametric Distributions

Four bivariate families used as running examples throughout the package: Gumbel bivariate exponential, Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern (FGM), bivariate power, and Schur-constant. Each provides d/p/s/r functions where applicable.

dgumbel_biv() sgumbel_biv() pgumbel_biv() rgumbel_biv()
Gumbel Bivariate Exponential Distribution
pfgm_biv() dfgm_biv() sfgm_biv() rfgm_biv()
Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern (FGM) Bivariate Distribution
pbivpower() sbivpower() dbivpower() rbivpower()
Bivariate Power Distribution
sschur_biv() rschur_biv()
Schur-Constant Bivariate Distribution

Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives

Core functions from Jayalekshmi, Rajesh & Nair (2022, Comm. Stat. Theory and Methods). Covers the closed-form Gumbel result, general numerical integration, bivariate hazard gradient and MRL, NBUHR/NWUHR aging class characterisation, nonparametric estimation, and a Monte-Carlo simulator.

blt_residual()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
blt_residual_gumbel()
Closed-Form Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives (Gumbel)
biv_hazard_gradient()
Bivariate Hazard Gradient
biv_mean_residual()
Bivariate Mean Residual Life Function
nbuhr_test()
Test NBUHR / NWUHR Aging Class
np_blt_residual()
Nonparametric Estimator for the Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
sim_blt_residual()
Monte-Carlo Simulation Study for the BLT Residual Estimator

Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives

Implements the BLt-Rrl framework from Jayalekshmi & Rajesh (Int. J. Reliability, Quality & Safety Eng.): reversed hazard gradient, reversed mean residual life, and closed-form results for FGM and bivariate power distributions.

blt_reversed()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives
blt_reversed_fgm()
Closed-Form BLT of Reversed Residual Lives for the FGM Distribution
blt_reversed_power()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives — Power Distribution
biv_rhazard_gradient()
Bivariate Reversed Hazard Gradient
biv_rmrl()
Bivariate Reversed Mean Residual Life Function

Univariate Residual Life Analysis

Univariate Laplace transform of residual life , hazard rate , mean residual life , and a nonparametric estimator.

lt_residual()
Univariate Laplace Transform of Residual Life
hazard_rate()
Univariate Hazard Rate Function
mean_residual()
Univariate Mean Residual Life
np_lt_residual()
Nonparametric Estimator for the Univariate Laplace Transform of Residual Life

Stochastic Ordering (Bivariate)

Seven bivariate stochastic order checks: BLt-rl, BLt-Rrl, weak bivariate hazard rate, MRL, bivariate relative MRL, reversed hazard rate, and reversed MRL. Each function returns a logical flag and supporting diagnostic values.

blt_order_residual()
Bivariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives (BLt-rl)
blt_order_reversed()
Bivariate Laplace Transform Order of Reversed Residual Lives (BLt-Rrl)
biv_whr_order()
Weak Bivariate Hazard Rate Order
biv_wmrl_order()
Weak Bivariate Mean Residual Life Order
biv_brlmr_order()
Bivariate Relative Mean Residual Life Order
biv_wrhr_order()
Weak Bivariate Reversed Hazard Rate Order
biv_wrmrl_order()
Weak Bivariate Reversed Mean Residual Life Order

Stochastic Ordering (Univariate)

Three univariate stochastic order checks based on the Laplace transform of residual life, hazard rate, and mean residual life.

lt_rl_order()
Univariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives
hr_order()
Hazard Rate Order
mrl_order()
Mean Residual Life Order

Entropy and Information Generating Functions

Shannon differential entropy and Golomb’s (1966) information generating function for non-negative continuous random variables.

shannon_entropy()
Shannon Differential Entropy
info_gen_function()
Golomb Information Generating Function

Plotting Utilities

Convenience wrappers that produce ready-made plots for the BLT of residual lives and the BLT of reversed residual lives.

plot_blt_residual()
Plot Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
plot_blt_reversed()
Plot Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives

Package

Package-level documentation and metadata.

BivLaplaceRL-package BivLaplaceRL
BivLaplaceRL: Bivariate Laplace Transforms, Stochastic Orders, and Entropy Measures in Reliability

On this page

Developed by Mahesh Divakaran, S. Jayalekshmi, G. Rajesh, N. Unnikrishnan Nair.
